title: Simplistic textures
description: A texture pack that makes Minecraft textures way more simplistic
body: This texture pack is primarily designed for enhancing the visual experience of Minecraft on servers such as Hypixel. The mod focuses on significantly simplifying the default textures in the game, transforming them into an extremely minimalist style. Each texture in this pack is reduced to just two primary colors, providing a stark contrast to the original, more detailed textures. This streamlined approach aims to create a cleaner, more uniform visual aesthetic that can contribute to a distinct and coherent look, especially suited for high-paced multiplayer environments.
